# ExpressDefinition.XmlBaseType property

The Xs:Type corresponding to the express definition, if it can be determined. For example, for "IfcLabel" it would return "xs:string", for "IfcInteger" it would return "xs:integer", and for "IfcGloballyUniqueId" it would return "xs:string".

```csharp
public string XmlBaseType { get; }
```
